project_title: An Agentic AI Framework for Automating the Software Development Lifecycle

files.purpose: Project overview, setup instructions, and usage guide
files.content:
# An Agentic AI Framework

## Overview
This project automates the software development lifecycle.

## Setup Instructions
1. Clone the repository.
2. Install dependencies using `pip install -r requirements.txt`.
3. Run the application using `python app.py`.

## Usage
Access the application at `http://localhost:5000`.

files.purpose: Application entry point with Flask app initialization
files.content:
from flask import Flask
from routes import main_routes

app = Flask(__name__)

app.register_blueprint(main_routes)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)

from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy

db = SQLAlchemy()

class Ticket(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)  # FR-01
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=False)  # FR-01
    category = db.Column(db.String(50), nullable=False)  # FR-01
    status = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Open')  # FR-06

traceability.notes: Ticket creation logic needs to be implemented.
Logic to retrieve tickets needs to be implemented.
Logic for staff to view all tickets needs to be implemented.
Ticket assignment logic needs to be implemented.
Logic to add notes needs to be implemented.
Status update logic needs to be implemented.
Notification system needs to be implemented.
User authentication needs to be implemented.
Logging implementation needs to be defined.
User interface design needs to be defined.

limitations: Currently, no authentication or notification system is implemented.
Logging and user interface are not defined.
